seoTitle: Imanpa vs Irlpme — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Imanpa and Irlpme. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Imanpa and Irlpme.
heading: Imanpa vs Irlpme — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Imanpa, Northern Territory and Irlpme, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Irlpme has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Imanpa (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Imanpa or Irlpme safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Imanpa has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Irlpme scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Imanpa scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Irlpme scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Imanpa or Irlpme?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Irlpme has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
